title: mentha × kerneri var. stachyoides
intro: Mentha × kerneri var. stachyoides, also known as Bergamot Mint or Kerners Mint, is a hybrid of the species Mentha × kerneri and Mentha stachyoides, and is a member of the Lamiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × kerneri var. stachyoides include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as congestion and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
